evals.prompt: Check my inbox and show me the 10 most recent emails with their subjects and senders
evals.expected_output: Should compose emailcli list command with --limit 10, parse JSON output, present results clearly with subjects and senders

evals.prompt: Send an email to team@company.com with subject 'Weekly Update' and body 'Here is the weekly status report for your review.' CC to manager@company.com and attach report.pdf
evals.expected_output: Should compose emailcli send command with --to, --subject, --body, --cc, and --attach flags, execute it, check for success/error

evals.prompt: Search my email for messages containing 'invoice' in the subject from this month
evals.expected_output: Should compose emailcli search command with appropriate Gmail search syntax (subject:invoice after:2024/01/01 or similar), parse results

evals.prompt: Mark emails with IDs 12345, 12346, and 12347 as read, then move them to the Archive folder
evals.expected_output: Should compose two batch commands: emailcli mark --ids 12345,12346,12347 --read and emailcli move --ids 12345,12346,12347 --folder "[Gmail]/Archive", check each for success

evals.prompt: Delete all emails in my trash that are older than 30 days. First show me what would be deleted.
evals.expected_output: Should first search for emails matching that criteria, present them, then ask for confirmation before composing delete commands
